prompt: Create a Vue component that shows a list of API routes with method badges (GET, POST, DELETE), route paths, and status badges. It should look like a proper Konnect table with sortable columns and hover states.

assertions.text: Method badge colors are correct: GET=green (Green 60), POST=blue (Blue 60), DELETE=red (Red 60)
Uses CSS variables (var(--color-*)) not raw hex values for colors
Uses JetBrains Mono font for route paths / code text
Table rows have hover state styling
Sort headers cycle through none→asc→desc states
Uses Vue 3 <script setup lang="ts"> SFC pattern
Icons imported from @kong/icons with correct PascalCase names
